note: Calibration ledger: one falsifiable claim per side per edition, with a plain-English resolution condition and check-back date. Status: open | vindicated | falsified | unresolvable.

claims.claim: Total token consumption growth will dwarf any revenue lost to enterprises shifting to cheaper token baskets.
claims.resolution: By the check date, OpenAI + Anthropic combined revenue run-rate is at least 30% above the ~$60B/yr projected for 2026, without across-the-board price rises doing the work.

claims.claim: AI revenue growth is slowing and will slow further as token-based billing exposes true costs to customers.
claims.resolution: By the check date, labs' quarter-on-quarter revenue growth has visibly flattened versus 2025, or a second wave of enterprise spending caps arrives at lower limits than Uber's $1,500/seat.
